metadata.name: Detect and Locate Water Main Break

description: Flow sensors in the water network indicate a significant pressure drop, suggesting a major leak or main break.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge a 'Major Pressure Loss' alarm in 'Water Sector 7'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the alarm and the affected water sector.

nodes.task_description: Analyze flow rate data from sensors within the sector to triangulate the likely location of the break.

expected_outcome.value: The system analyzes the data and suggests the break is located near 'Oak Street'.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a water utility repair crew to the suspected location to confirm and begin repairs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a work order and dispatches a crew.
